---
id: delete-credential
title: "Delete a credential"
description: "Permanently delete an encrypted credential. Integrations using this credential will fail connectivity tests until a new credential is stored."
sidebar_label: "Delete a credential"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api/transform-platform-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a credential"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/credentials/{ref}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Permanently delete an encrypted credential. Integrations using this credential will fail connectivity tests until a new credential is stored.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
